arts.ttl: FIFA's lowest-ranked San Marino promoted in NL
arts.sum: World football's lowest ranked national team San Marino clinched promotion to Nations League C with a 3-1 comeback victory at Group D1 rivals Liechtenstein on Monday.

arts.ttl: Liechtenstein vs. San Marino (18 de Nov., 2024) Resultados en Vivo
